delete.description: The cache is immediately cleared synchronously for all used adapters.

204.description: Returns a no content response indicating that the cache has been cleared.

delete.description: Directly triggers invalidation of all cache tags that were marked for invalidation.

parameters.name: refreshOpenSearch
parameters.description: This parameter indicates that in addition to invalidating the delayed caches, the opensearch indices will also be refreshed, which should lead to a clean state on the next read requests. When OpenSearch is not used this parameter will be ignored.

204.description: Returns a no content response indicating that the cache has been cleared.
